# table_cohort_count { #cdmconnector.table_cohort_count }

```python
table_cohort_count(result, *, header=None, group_column=None, hide=None)
```

Format a summarise_cohort_count result into a table.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                             | Description   | Default    |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result       | SummarisedResult or DataFrame.                   |               | _required_ |
| header       | Columns for header. Default \[\"cohort_name\"\]. |               | `None`     |
| group_column | Extra grouping columns.                          |               | `None`     |
| hide         | Columns to hide.                                 |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |
